??Munich Football Arena, Munich 

It should not be a surprise to anyone that Spain is considered the favorite in this match, especially since they won all 5 out of 5 matches played at Euro 2024. Team of great individuals, shining youngsters, and just experienced footballers playing with good synergy all together. Their goals in previous matches  were scored not only by players from the starting 11, but also by substitutes, moreover the game played by La Roja is simply beautiful to the eye and also very effective. In turn, the French national team did not impress at this tournament, having problems with maintaining an offensive style of play and scoring goals from the field. Nevertheless, Spain will play this match without several key players (Dani Carvajal, Robin Le Normand, Pedri), while three colors squad looks ready.
My choice: Spain ????
